$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

enabled.description: Whether to enable the access point

password.description: Access point password (omit to keep current, empty string to clear)

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

authenticated.description: true if the request carries a valid session

required.description: true if an admin password is set

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

decoders.description: Decoder/parser names from the sensor registry

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

blank_after.description: Idle duration before screen blanks, e.g. "20m"

hide_clock_date.description: Hide the clock and date block on the kiosk overlay

locale.description: BCP-47 date/time locale for the kiosk clock, e.g. en-US

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the kiosk clock/date, e.g. Europe/Budapest; empty uses the browser timezone

location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

value.description: The value at the given location

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

share_password.description: Write-only; leave blank to keep current

share_password_set.description: true if a password is stored; set false on PUT to clear

humidity.description: Caption under the humidity reading; empty hides it

inside.description: Caption under the inside reading; empty hides it

outside.description: Caption under the outside reading; empty hides it

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

password.description: Write-only; leave blank to keep current

password_set.description: true if a password is stored; set false on PUT to clear

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

auto.description: Whether automatic power management is active

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

commit.description: Apply the order to the running slideshow now (sent on Done)

names.description: Full ordered list of image filenames

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

current.description: Current password; required when one is already set

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

ip.description: Primary non-loopback IPv4, empty if none

uptime.description: Process uptime as a Go duration, e.g. 3h12m0s

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

available.description: Whether a newer version is available

last_check.description: RFC3339 time of the last check

last_check_ok.description: False when the last check couldn't reach the release source

last_result.description: Outcome of the last apply, e.g. 'rolled back from v1.2.0'

last_result_seq.description: Bumps each time a result is recorded; lets the UI detect a repeated outcome

notes_url.description: Release notes page for the newest version

github_token.description: Write-only; leave blank to keep current

github_token_set.description: true if a token is stored; set false on PUT to clear

api_key.description: Write-only; leave blank to keep current

api_key_set.description: true if an API key is stored; set false on PUT to clear

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

post.summary: Log in to the admin UI
Log out of the admin UI
Set, change, or clear the admin password

get.summary: Report whether auth is required and the caller is logged in

put.summary: Save configuration (Tier-1 fields apply live; others require restart)

get.summary: Get configuration metadata (enum values for UI selects)
Enumerate Bluetooth adapters and display outputs from sysfs
Report version, uptime, hostname and primary IP

post.summary: Reload the frame backend in place (re-exec; systemd sees no crash)
Download, verify, and apply the latest release
Check the release source for a newer version now

schema.description: Each oneOf object in the array represents one possible Server Sent Events (SSE) message, serialized as UTF-8 text according to the SSE specification.
schema.title: Server Sent Events
